scripts.cf:staging: NITRO_PRESET=cloudflare_module nuxt build && node scripts/inject-wrangler-env.mjs && npx wrangler deploy --config .output/server/wrangler.json --env staging && node scripts/sync-wrangler-ids.mjs && node scripts/inject-wrangler-env.mjs && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply crouton-builder-preview-db --env staging --remote
scripts.db:migrate:staging: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply crouton-builder-preview-db --env staging --remote
